_comment: Copy to ariadne.config.json and edit. Paths are resolved relative to this file. Omit `scanners` to let Ariadne infer them from the repo's files (pom.xml/build.gradle → JVM backend; package.json + apollo/SDL → TS BFF; package.json → frontend; @cubejs-backend dep → cube). `bff_services` is derived from any repo whose scanner list contains `graphql`. Explicit scanners always win — use the object form when a scanner needs mappings that can't be inferred (settings_key_map, url_prefix_map, client_target_map, base_class_service).

repos._comment: Example override: keep the object form when a scanner needs mappings.
